metadata.description: Structured plan-first development plugin for Claude Code with .flow/ task tracking, Agent Teams, and Ralph autonomous mode

plugins.name: flow-code
plugins.description: Zero-dependency planning + execution with .flow/ task tracking. Teams-default auto-parallel execution with file locking and runtime DAG mutation (split/skip/dep rm). Ralph autonomous mode with multi-model review gates. PreCompact state preservation across context compression. 20 subagents, 25+ CLI commands, 23 skills.
